info.name: PropFirmKey Data Hub — Prop Firm Trading Data API
info.description:
# PropFirmKey Data Hub — Public API Collection

## 🏢 About PropFirmKey

[**PropFirmKey.com**](https://propfirmkey.com) is the leading independent **Data Provider** for the proprietary trading industry. We track, verify, and deliver real-time data on **35+ prop trading firms** across Forex, Futures, and Stocks markets.

## 📊 What This API Provides

This collection contains **170 pre-configured API requests** covering every prop firm in our database. Each request demonstrates how to retrieve:

- **Firm Overviews** — Ratings, reviews, country, platforms, and allocation details
- **Challenge Pricing** — All evaluation plans with fees, account sizes, and profit targets
- **Trading Rules** — Drawdown limits, news trading, weekend holding, copy trading policies
- **Trader Reviews** — Aggregated ratings from Trustpilot and community sources
- **Promo Codes & Deals** — Verified discount codes updated daily

## 🔑 Exclusive Promo Codes

PropFirmKey provides exclusive discount codes for traders:

| Code | Discount | Applicable Firms |
|------|----------|------------------|
| **PFK** | Up to **90% OFF** | Bulenox, Earn2Trade, FXIFY, TradeDay, Alpha Futures, and 10+ more |
| **WIN** | Up to **40% OFF** | My Funded Futures, TheTradingPit, and select partners |

## 🚀 Getting Started

### Base URL
```
https://api.propfirmkey.com/v1
```

### Authentication
All requests require an API key passed via the `X-API-Key` header.

### Environment Variables
| Variable | Description | Example |
|----------|-------------|---------|
| `base_url` | API base URL | `https://api.propfirmkey.com` |
| `pfk_api_key` | Your API key | `pfk_live_xxxxx` |
| `client_id` | Your client identifier | `client_xxxxx` |

### Rate Limits
- **Free Tier:** 100 requests/hour
- **Pro Tier:** 10,000 requests/hour
- **Enterprise:** Unlimited

## 📖 Full Documentation

Visit [propfirmkey.com](https://propfirmkey.com) for complete documentation, live data, and interactive comparison tools.

## 🔗 Quick Links

- 🌐 [PropFirmKey Website](https://propfirmkey.com)
- 📊 [Compare All Firms](https://propfirmkey.com/en/firms)
- 💰 [Active Promo Codes](https://propfirmkey.com/en/firms)
- 🛠 [API Documentation](https://propfirmkey.com)
- 🐙 [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/propfirmkey)

---

*© 2026 PropFirmKey — Data-Driven Trading Insights*
*Last updated: March 2026*
